notes:
I've designed the 'Fandom Flux: Discovery Hub' for you! This screen captures that high-energy, social-native feel with live reaction cards, creator mashup modules, and a playful, TikTok-inspired challenge section. I've used a vibrant dark theme with neon purple and pink accents, and high-contrast labels for that rapid-scan hierarchy you asked for. 

I've also created the 'Fandom Flux' design system to keep this look consistent as we build out more of the hub. What do you think?
prompt: Design a TikTok-like fandom hub page with live reaction cards, creator mashups, challenge modules, rapid scan hierarchy, and playful participation prompts. Keep the energy high and social-native.
suggestions: Add a mobile version of this screen
Design a creator profile page in this style
Add more social interaction features like a chat drawer
title: Fandom Flux: Discovery Hub
